title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 245.495 - Board may issue warrants
text:
245.495.  Board may issue warrants. — The board of directors may, at its option, in lieu of bonds, issue warrants on the county treasurer, payable out of the fund of the levee district, in payment of any indebtedness incurred, including the entire expenses of constructing the levee, repairing or extending the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 12556) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10966; 1919 § 4658; 1909 § 5721
